author: DominicVainMod
content:
@here

Claim Stake + Faction Fleet Requirements Correction

We need to make a quick corrective statement about the requirements needed to enlist your Claim Stake into Faction Fleet. 

At the Town Hall, we said that users would need a Mining Drill and Power Plant in order to enlist your Claim Stakes in Faction Fleet. This is NOT CORRECT and you will be able to stake your Claim Stakes with just the Claim. We apologize for any confusion.

Reminder: This ONLY has to do with Claim Stake Faction Fleet enlistment. Mining Drills and Power Plants will still be needed in SAGE.
